articles.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
articles.description: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.
articles.titleJa: ゼレンスキー大統領、プーチン大統領に公開書簡で直接会談を提案
articles.summary: ウクライナのゼレンスキー大統領は、プーチン大統領に対し、戦争終結には両国間の「直接的な対話」が不可欠であると訴える公開書簡を送った。

articles.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
articles.description: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.
articles.titleJa: 少女殺害容疑者の前科公開でフランスに怒り広がる
articles.summary: フランスで11歳の少女殺害容疑者の男に過去の児童性的虐待の可能性が指摘されていたことが明らかになり、国民の間に怒りが広がっている。

articles.title: How Trump's White House ballroom plan has doubled in size and cost over a year
articles.description: BBC Verify examines how the biggest change to the White House in decades has transformed in the last year.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏のホワイトハウス舞踏室計画、1年で規模と費用が2倍に
articles.summary: トランプ前大統領によるホワイトハウスの舞踏室改築計画が、過去1年で規模も費用も当初の2倍に膨れ上がったことが明らかになった。

articles.title: Hezbollah rejects renewed ceasefire agreed by Israel and Lebanon
articles.description: The United States announced the ceasefire agreement on Wednesday night following a fresh round of talks.
articles.titleJa: ヒズボラ、イスラエルとレバノンが合意した新たな停戦を拒否
articles.summary: イスラエルとレバノン間で合意された新たな停戦を、レバノンのイスラム教シーア派組織ヒズボラが拒否した。アメリカが合意を発表していた。

articles.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
articles.description: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.
articles.titleJa: サハラ砂漠でトラック故障後、約50人が喉の渇きで死亡
articles.summary: サハラ砂漠でトラックが故障し、乗っていた約50人が喉の渇きで死亡した。生存者2人が当局に知らせるため50km以上を徒歩で移動した。

articles.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, with girlfriend's son arrested
articles.description: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.
articles.titleJa: 米俳優ジェームズ・ハンディ氏が刺殺され、恋人の息子が逮捕
articles.summary: 映画「ジュマンジ」などに出演した米俳優ジェームズ・ハンディ氏（81歳）が刺殺され、恋人の息子が容疑者として逮捕された。

articles.title: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew in custody, prosecutors say
articles.description: Zeynab Javadli had not been in contact with any of her friends since Tuesday.
articles.titleJa: ドバイ首長のおいの元妻が拘束されたと検察が発表
articles.summary: ドバイ首長のおいの元妻であるゼイナブ・ジャヴァドリ氏が火曜日以降、友人との連絡が途絶えており、検察は彼女が現在拘束されていると発表した。

articles.title: Mangrove forests are healing after decades of human destruction
articles.description: Swampy mangrove forests are staging a surprise comeback - which is good news for coastal communities and the climate.
articles.titleJa: 数十年にわたる人間の破壊を経てマングローブ林が回復
articles.summary: 数十年にわたる人間の破壊にもかかわらず、湿地帯のマングローブ林が驚くべき回復を見せており、沿岸地域と気候にとって朗報となっている。

articles.title: US journalist pleads guilty to working as China's agent
articles.description: Thomas Weir Pauken II, 50, knowingly worked with people employed by the Chinese government for years.
articles.titleJa: 米ジャーナリスト、中国のスパイとして活動した罪を認める
articles.summary: 米国のジャーナリスト、トーマス・ウィアー・ポーケン2世（50歳）が、長年にわたり中国政府関係者と共謀して活動したとして罪を認めた。

articles.title: China cracks down on soft porn, violence and materialism in viral micro dramas
articles.description: Micro dramas have surged in popularity, but drawn criticism for often sensationalist content.
articles.titleJa: 中国、流行のショートドラマにおけるソフトポルノ、暴力、物質主義を取り締まり
articles.summary: 中国が、人気が急上昇している短尺ドラマの、しばしば扇情的なソフトポルノや暴力、物質主義的コンテンツに対し取り締まりを強化している。

articles.title: Germany news: National team to fail winning World Cup, Germans expect
articles.description: According to a poll, some three or four out of ten Germans do not believe that Julian Nagelsmann's team will become world champions. Meanwhile, the German foreign minister is visiting Mexico. Follow DW for more.
articles.titleJa: ドイツ代表、ワールドカップ優勝は無理と国民が予想
articles.summary: 世論調査によると、ドイツ国民の約3〜4割がサッカー代表チームのワールドカップ優勝を信じていない。ドイツ外相はメキシコを訪問中。

articles.title: Middle East: UN doubles Lebanon aid appeal amid Israel war
articles.description: The UN says it is seeking an additional $331.5 million to tackle a worsening humanitarian crisis in Lebanon. Meanwhile, Israel is carrying out fresh strikes on the south of the country. Follow DW for the latest.
articles.titleJa: 中東：国連、イスラエル戦争の中でレバノン支援要請を倍増
articles.summary: 国連はレバノンの人道危機悪化に対応するため、追加で3億3150万ドルの支援を要請。イスラエルは同国南部で攻撃を継続。

articles.title: Janez Jansa — Slovenia's great political survivor — is back
articles.description: The new coalition government of Slovenia's veteran leader Janez Jansa was approved by parliament on Thursday. It's already advancing divisive policies that some warn could deepen polarization.
articles.titleJa: ヤネス・ヤンシャ氏、スロベニア政界の偉大な生存者が復帰
articles.summary: スロベニアのベテラン指導者ヤネス・ヤンシャ氏の新連立政権が議会で承認。分断を深める可能性のある政策を進めており、国民の極化を招くとの懸念もある。

articles.title: Ukraine: Marine drone explodes in Romanian port
articles.description: A naval drone exploded near an oil terminal in the Romanian Black Sea port of Constanta on Friday morning, causing no injuries. The Russian embassy in Bucharest claimed the device was Ukrainian. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: ウクライナ：ルーマニア港で海洋ドローン爆発
articles.summary: ルーマニアのコンスタンツァ港で海洋ドローンが爆発したが、負傷者なし。ロシアはウクライナ製と主張。ウクライナ戦争の波及が懸念される。

articles.title: Environment wins of the week
articles.description: Good news about the state of the planet might seem to be in short supply, but it’s out there. Each week, DW’s environment desk brings you what went right.
articles.titleJa: 今週の環境分野の朗報
articles.summary: 地球の状態に関する良いニュースは少ないように思えるが、確かに存在する。DWの環境デスクが毎週、うまくいったことを紹介。

articles.title: EU to advance expansion plans at Balkans summit
articles.description: European leaders are gathering in Montenegro with EU expansion high on the agenda. Montenegro is a leading candidate for accession while, further east, Ukraine and Moldova also harbor ambitions.
articles.titleJa: EU、バルカン諸国首脳会議で拡大計画を推進へ
articles.summary: 欧州首脳がモンテネグロに集結、EU拡大計画が主要議題。モンテネグロ、ウクライナ、モルドバが加盟候補として意欲を示している。

articles.title: Australia seizes 100,000 illegal cockroaches in record bug bust
articles.description: The haul of live insects included dubia cockroaches and Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Authorities said it was the country's biggest-ever seizure of illegal exotic invertebrates.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリア、記録的な虫の摘発で違法ゴキブリ10万匹を押収
articles.summary: オーストラリア当局が記録的な数の違法ゴキブリ10万匹を押収。デュビアゴキブリなどが含まれ、同国史上最大の違法外来無脊椎動物の摘発となった。

articles.title: India news: Putin hails Delhi ties, Trump calls Modi 'good friend'
articles.description: Russian leader Vladimir Putin said that India’s cooperation with the US won't harm India-Russia relations, while US President Donald Trump said he has a "good relationship" with Prime Minister Narendra Modi. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: インドニュース：プーチン大統領がデリーとの関係を称賛、トランプ氏がモディ氏を「良い友人」と呼ぶ
articles.summary: プーチン大統領はインドと米国の協力が露印関係を損なわないと発言。トランプ米大統領はモディ首相との「良好な関係」を強調した。

articles.title: SSRI antidepressants are often 'carelessly prescribed'
articles.description: SSRIs, like Prozac and Zoloft, are among the world's most-prescribed psychiatric drugs. These antidepressants help a lot of people. But they don't always work. In fact, some experts suggest they are overprescribed.
articles.titleJa: SSRI抗うつ薬は「不注意に処方される」ことが多い
articles.summary: SSRI抗うつ薬は世界で最も処方される精神科薬だが、常に効果があるわけではない。一部専門家は過剰処方されていると指摘する。

articles.title: What are EU social media alternatives to Instagram, TikTok?
articles.description: Opaque algorithms, too little legal protection for minors, a lot of hate speech and disinformation: in Europe, US and Chinese social media platforms have long drawn criticism. Europe wants to go its own way — but how?
articles.titleJa: インスタグラム、TikTokに代わるEUのソーシャルメディアの選択肢とは？
articles.summary: 不透明なアルゴリズムや未成年者保護の欠如が批判される中、EUはインスタグラムやTikTokに代わる独自のソーシャルメディアを模索している。

articles.title: ‘Family values’ African charter condemned by rights groups as regressive and dangerous
articles.description:
Draft treaty claims sexual and reproductive health and rights are an existential threat to the African family
An African treaty that rejects longstanding international human rights obligations moved a step closer to becoming policy this week as governments across the continent met in Ghana.
The draft African charter on family, sovereignty and values, seen by the Guardian, asserts that African values and culture are under attack from “foreign ideologies” and urges states to withdraw from any agreements that do not align with the principles of the charter, including the 2003 Maputo protocol, which promotes gender equality and protects the reproductive and health rights of women and girls.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「家族の価値」アフリカ憲章が「退行的で危険」と権利団体から非難される
articles.summary: アフリカ各国政府が家族の価値観に関する憲章を採択。性と生殖に関する健康と権利を脅威とみなし、既存の人権条約からの脱退を促すもので、人権団体から危険かつ退行的だと非難されている。

articles.title: Experts criticise plan for American-only Ebola quarantine centre in Kenya
articles.description:
Plan departs from policy of bringing CDC staff back to US for treatment and offering support to all health workers
Former top US officials and other experts are urging the Trump administration to abandon plans for an Ebola quarantine and treatment centre in Kenya, as the union for workers with the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) calls for Americans exposed to Ebola to be brought home for treatment.
Soon after the US revealed it was setting up a field hospital in Kenya for the Ebola quarantine and treatment of Americans, the Kenyan high court blocked the order – but the Kenyan and US governments moved forward anyway, with the first American responders reportedly landing at the Laikipia airbase on Saturday.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ケニアにおけるアメリカ人専用エボラ隔離センター計画に専門家が批判
articles.summary: 米国がケニアにアメリカ人専用のエボラ隔離・治療施設を設置する計画に対し、専門家が批判。ケニアの高等裁判所は阻止したが、両国政府は計画を進めている。

articles.title: Civilians flee as Somali troops and opposition-allied militias trade fire in Mogadishu
articles.description:
Violence flares before protests on Thursday over president’s decision to remain in office after his term expired
Fierce clashes have taken place between government troops and militias allied with the opposition in Somalia’s capital, Mogadishu, damaging property and forcing some civilians to flee.
In the runup to the fighting, which started on Wednesday afternoon, opposition leaders embedded with militias set up positions in their clan strongholds the city.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ソマリア軍と反体制派民兵がモガディシュで銃撃戦、住民が避難
articles.summary: ソマリアの首都モガディシュで、政府軍と反体制派の民兵の間で激しい衝突が発生し、住民が避難している。大統領の任期切れ後の続投決定に対する抗議行動を前に緊張が高まっている。

articles.title: Rebel attacks in eastern DRC kill 30 people and hamper Ebola response
articles.description:
Islamic State-linked militia blamed for raids in North Kivu as governor says three patients with disease fled clinics
Rebel attacks around a town that is one of the centres of the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo have left more than 30 people dead over the past few days, complicating the response to the disease.
At least 10 people were massacred in raids on three villages around the city of Beni, in North Kivu, in the early hours of Wednesday morning.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 東DRCでの反乱軍攻撃で30人死亡、エボラ対応を妨害
articles.summary: コンゴ民主共和国東部で反乱軍の攻撃により30人以上が死亡。エボラ出血熱の流行中心地での襲撃で、感染症対応がさらに困難になっている。

articles.title: DRC Ebola outbreak could have begun as early as January, WHO chief says
articles.description:
Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus says the virus ‘had a big head start’  but that the response was catching up
The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo could have begun as early as January, the head of the World Health Organization said, giving the virus “a big head start”.
Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus also said the response was being hindered by blanket travel restrictions and highlighted high levels of community mistrust and low levels of contact tracing as key concerns.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: DRCのエボラ流行は1月には始まっていた可能性、WHO事務局長が発言
articles.summary: WHO事務局長は、コンゴ民主共和国のエボラ流行が1月には始まっていた可能性を指摘。ウイルスが先行しており、広範な渡航制限や地域社会の不信感が対応を妨げていると述べた。

articles.title: US imposes new sanctions on Cuban president and Castro family members
articles.description:
US secretary of state Marco Rubio says anyone providing services to listed entities ‘is at risk of sanctions themselves’
The United States has announced fresh economic sanctions on Cuba’s president and some of his immediate family, alongside members of the Castro family, in Washington’s latest ramping up of pressure on its communist-led neighbour.
Among those targeted were the son and a grandson of former president Raúl Castro, who no longer holds an official position but remains a key figure on decisions about the future of the island.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 米国、キューバ大統領とカストロ一族に新たな制裁を課す
articles.summary: 米国がキューバ大統領およびカストロ一族に新たな経済制裁を発表した。これは共産主義国家であるキューバに対するワシントンの圧力強化の一環。

articles.title: Canada endorses embattled marine park’s plan to relocate 30 beluga whales
articles.description:
Beluga whales, which Marineland threatened to euthanize in 2025, will be moved to sanctuaries in Spain or across US
Canada and an embattled marine park have reached a tentative deal on the future of 30 beluga whales, ending a saga that has captivated the public and angered animal rights groups.
The federal fisheries ministry announced this week that all of Marineland’s belugas would be shipped to either Spain or one of four locations in the US, ending whale captivity in Canada.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カナダ、問題の海洋公園によるシロイルカ30頭移送計画を承認
articles.summary: カナダ政府は、問題となっているマリンランドのシロイルカ30頭をスペインや米国の保護区に移送する計画を承認。これによりカナダでのクジラの飼育が終了する見込み。

articles.title: Outrage in Argentina after two teen girls murdered as femicide crisis endures
articles.description:
Country is shaken by the brutal murders of two girls, aged 14 and 17, whose bodies were discovered just days apart
Argentina has reacted with fury after the bodies of two murdered teenage girls were found just two days apart. The latest killings underscore the South American country’s enduring femicide crisis despite years of feminist campaigning, and have prompted alarm over the decision to cut support for victims of gender-based violence under the far-right administration of Javier Milei.
Police found the remains of Agostina Vega, 14, on Saturday, in a field on the outskirts of the city of Córdoba. She had been fatally strangled and her body had been dismembered, according to local media reports.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: アルゼンチンで少女2人殺害、女性殺害危機が続く中、怒りが爆発
articles.summary: アルゼンチンで10代の少女2人が殺害され、世論の怒りが高まっている。同国が長年抱える女性殺害危機の深刻さを示しており、被害者支援削減に対する懸念も増している。

articles.title: Jamaican police officer charged with murder after woman shot during protest
articles.description:
Andrew Wilson appears in court over killing of Latoya Bulgin at protest over a police shooting days earlier
Authorities in Jamaica have taken the rare step of charging a police officer with murder after he was accused of shooting a 45-year-old woman in a case that prompted violent protests.
According to the Independent Commission of Investigations (Indecom), Constable Andrew Wilson appeared in court on Wednesday and was denied bail. Another hearing is scheduled for mid-June.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ジャマイカで警官がデモ中に女性を銃撃し殺人の罪で起訴
articles.summary: ジャマイカで、デモ中に女性を銃撃した警察官が殺人の罪で起訴された。この事件は激しい抗議行動を引き起こしており、当局が警官を起訴することは稀な措置とされる。

articles.title: Dead but deportable: US immigration judge signed order to eject teen murder victim
articles.description:
North Carolina judge said Levi Mendez-Maldonado failed to show up in court – even after being told he had died in 2024
An immigration judge in Charlotte, North Carolina, recently ordered the deportation of a young man who was killed in 2024, citing his failure to appear in court.
Judge Amy Lee ordered the removal of Levi Mendez-Maldonado in absentia on 21 May. Mendez-Maldonado, originally from Honduras, came to the United States as an unaccompanied minor at age 17 and was murdered in a shooting in November 2024.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 死亡しているのに強制送還可能：米移民裁判官、殺害された10代の少年の追放命令に署名
articles.summary: 米国の移民裁判官が、2024年に殺害された未成年者に対し、出廷しなかったとして強制送還命令を下した。この誤りは、移民制度における深刻な欠陥と人権問題を示している。

articles.title: Romania: TV reporter flees live on air after drone explosion in Constanța
articles.description: A live television report from Romania's Black Sea port of Constanța was abruptly interrupted on 5 June after a maritime drone exploded nearby, heightening concerns over the regional impact of the war in Ukraine.
articles.titleJa: ルーマニア：コンスタンツァでのドローン爆発を受け、テレビ記者が生中継中に避難
articles.summary: ルーマニアのコンスタンツァ港で海洋ドローンが爆発し、生中継中のテレビ記者が避難。ウクライナ戦争の地域への影響に対する懸念が高まっている。

articles.title: 'Moved to tears': Winners of the 2026 World Food Photography Awards revealed
articles.description: From Soviet spas to sacred rivers, this World Food Photography Awards offer a glimpse into the many ways food influences our lives around the globe.
articles.titleJa: 「涙を流した」：2026年世界フード写真賞の受賞者が発表
articles.summary: 2026年世界フード写真賞の受賞者が発表され、ソビエトの温泉から聖なる川まで、食が世界中の生活に与える影響が示された。

articles.title: Five sailors killed as cargo ships struck in Sea of Azov
articles.description: The cargo vessels Natra and Zirkon — both bearing hallmarks of Russia's shadow fleet and heading to load grain at a port linked to looted Ukrainian supplies — were struck overnight near Taganrog.
articles.titleJa: アゾフ海で貨物船が攻撃され、船員5名が死亡
articles.summary: アゾフ海でロシアの「影の艦隊」と関連する貨物船2隻が攻撃され、船員5名が死亡。ウクライナから略奪された穀物を積載予定だったとされる。

articles.title: Podcast: The economic battle between Brussels and Beijing
articles.description: The EU is evaluating a de-risking strategy to reduce its dependence on China. But what would it take to make the bloc survive a new trade war?
articles.titleJa: ポッドキャスト：ブリュッセルと北京の経済戦争
articles.summary: EUが中国への依存度を減らすための「デリスキング戦略」を評価中。新たな貿易戦争でEUが生き残るには何が必要か、その経済的影響が議論されている。

articles.title: Romanian maritime drone explosion demonstrates Russian threat is increasing, von der Leyen says
articles.description: The incident on Friday morning is the latest in a growing number of drone incursions into EU and NATO territory.
articles.titleJa: ルーマニアの海洋ドローン爆発はロシアの脅威増大を示す、フォン・デア・ライエン氏が発言
articles.summary: ルーマニアでの海洋ドローン爆発事件を受け、フォン・デア・ライエン氏はロシアの脅威が増大していると述べた。これはEUおよびNATO領内へのドローン侵入増加の一例である。

articles.title: New AI-designed ‘universal vaccine’ could future-proof humans against unknown viruses
articles.description: A new AI-designed vaccine capable of protecting against entire families of viruses could transform how the world prepares for a future pandemic.
articles.titleJa: 新しいAI設計の「ユニバーサルワクチン」が未知のウイルスから人類を守る可能性
articles.summary: AIによって設計された新しい「ユニバーサルワクチン」が、ウイルスの全ファミリーに対する防御を提供し、将来のパンデミックへの世界の準備方法を変革する可能性がある。

articles.title: Smart pipelines: Can AI protect the world’s energy lifelines?
articles.description: As ageing pipelines face growing risks, the energy industry is increasingly turning to AI and smart monitoring systems to improve their safety and efficiency.
articles.titleJa: スマートパイプライン：AIは世界のエネルギー生命線を保護できるか？
articles.summary: 老朽化するパイプラインのリスクが増大する中、エネルギー業界はAIとスマート監視システムを導入し、安全性と効率の向上を図っている。

articles.title: Don’t keep calm and carry on: British women are among the angriest in Europe, survey reveals
articles.description: Long delays and dismissive attitudes within UK healthcare systems are impacting older British women especially, leaving them angrier and sadder than the rest of Europe.
articles.titleJa: 落ち着いてはいられない：英国人女性はヨーロッパで最も怒っている、調査が明らかに
articles.summary: 英国の医療システムにおける長時間の遅延と軽視する態度が、特に高齢の英国人女性に影響を与え、他のヨーロッパ諸国よりも彼女たちを怒り、悲しませていることが調査で判明した。

articles.title: Extreme heat is reaching Europe’s most northern cities. These mayors are determined to solve it
articles.description: From Athens to Oulu, European mayors are among 50 worldwide teaming up to protect citizens against extreme heat.
articles.titleJa: ヨーロッパ最北の都市にも猛暑が到達。市長たちは解決に奔走

articles.title: Rosa Pachurí Paraba: How Monkox indigenous women are leading Bolivia’s response to wildfires

articles.title: Costly fuel pushes more Indians to buy electric cars but challenges remain

articles.title: Goods trade holding up despite Middle East conflict and high energy prices

articles.title: Members share experiences and perspectives during WTO Trade and Environment Week
articles.description: The seventh edition of WTO Trade and Environment Week is taking place from 1 to 5 June at WTO headquarters in Geneva and online. The event features 16 public sessions organized by WTO members, focusing on a wide range of issues at the intersection of trade and the environment. It began with a meeting of the WTO Committee on Trade and Environment (CTE) chaired by Ambassador Ram Prasad Subedi of Nepal.
articles.titleJa: WTO貿易と環境週間で加盟国が経験と見解を共有

They also updated members on ongoing work with the Informal Working Group on Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs). Members also shared experiences on the links between intellectual property, innovation and women's economic empowerment as part of the group's second thematic focus for 2026.
articles.titleJa: ジェンダー平等賞の応募受付開始；貿易とジェンダー会議で知的財産に焦点

articles.title: Joint Statement by the Heads of the IEA, IMF, World Bank, and WTO
articles.description: The Heads of the International Energy Agency, International Monetary Fund, World Bank Group and World Trade Organization met on May 28 as part of the high-level coordination group established in April to maximise their institutions’ response to the energy, trade, and economic impacts of the war in the Middle East. Following the meeting, they issued the statement below:
articles.titleJa: IEA、IMF、世界銀行、WTOの首脳による共同声明
articles.summary: IEA、IMF、世界銀行、WTOの首脳が会合し、中東戦争によるエネルギー、貿易、経済への影響に対応するため共同声明を発表。高レベル調整グループとして連携を強化する。

The newly elected Chair, Ambassador Sumathi Balakrishnan of Malaysia, told the Working Group that she will work with all members to define a constructive path forward for the Group’s work.

articles.summary: 2026年5月27日、ニュージーランドは特定のアルミニウム押出材の輸入に対し、セーフガード調査を開始したことをWTOセーフガード委員会に通知した。

articles.title: Shipping industry cites mounting cost, capacity pressures amid global trade disruptions
articles.description: Senior executives from leading global shipping companies and industry groups underlined growing operational and economic challenges to goods trade during a 28 May meeting with WTO Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala. They noted that, while global supply chains have demonstrated resilience, efforts to identify and rely on alternative maritime routes amid disruptions – particularly in the Gulf region and other chokepoints – are driving up costs for shippers and ultimately consumers.
articles.titleJa: 世界貿易の混乱の中、海運業界はコスト増と輸送能力圧力を訴える
articles.summary: 世界的な海運会社の幹部らは、WTO事務局長との会合で、世界の貿易混乱によるコスト増と輸送能力の圧力を強調。代替航路の確保が運送業者や消費者のコストを押し上げていると指摘した。

articles.title: DDG Nordquist calls for urgent action on fisheries subsidies at Monaco Blue Initiative
articles.description: Deputy Director-General DJ Nordquist called for urgent action by WTO members to complete the acceptance and implementation of the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies and to advance negotiations on additional disciplines targeting overcapacity and overfishing. She delivered her remarks on 27 May at the Monaco Blue Initiative in Monaco. DDG Nordquist stressed that harmful fisheries subsidies continue to undermine ocean sustainability, economic resilience, and coastal livelihoods, while emphasizing that sustainable fisheries are essential for jobs, food security, and long-term prosperity. Her full remarks are below.
articles.titleJa: ノードキスト副事務局長、モナコ・ブルー・イニシアティブで漁業補助金に関する緊急行動を要請
articles.summary: ノードキストWTO副事務局長は、モナコ・ブルー・イニシアティブで漁業補助金協定の採択と実施、過剰漁獲対策の推進をWTO加盟国に緊急要請。有害な補助金が海洋の持続可能性を損なっていると強調した。

articles.title: WTO report highlights strong level of technical assistance despite resource constraints
articles.description: The 2025 Annual Report on Technical Assistance published by the WTO Secretariat on 27 May highlights that despite budgetary constraints, over 13,000 government officials from developing and least-developed WTO members and observers benefited from capacity-building activities in 2025. The report finds that 80 per cent of performance targets were fully or partially met, representing an increase from the ten-year 73 per cent average. Technical assistance activities were made available to 140 WTO members and observers, with Africa and Asia-Pacific remaining the two regions with the highest participation rates.
articles.titleJa: WTO報告書、資源制約にもかかわらず強力な技術支援水準を強調
articles.summary: WTO事務局の2025年年次報告書によると、予算制約があるにもかかわらず、開発途上国および後発開発途上国の政府関係者13,000人以上が能力構築活動の恩恵を受けた。アフリカとアジア太平洋地域の参加率が最も高かった。
